title: Fancy Tab Sections
description: A library to allow for easy control of Sections inside Creative Mode Tabs
body:
Fancy Tab Sections is a lightweight library allowing for easy customization of Creative Mode Tabs using Sections, inspired by Create Aeronautics

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_e18513d9-e934-4584-80bb-6c595d74f563.png)

Documentation on how to use this API is available at [https://github.com/MC-Expanded/Fancy-Tabs-Neo/wiki](https://github.com/MC-Expanded/Fancy-Tabs-Neo/wiki)

Fancy Tab Sections is designed to be Jar-in-Jar'd, meaning users won't have to download it separately when using your mod.
